name: Md. Naimur Rahman
title: Lecturer & Research Associate
bio_raw:
With two years of experience as a Research Assistant, he has actively contributed to scholarly pursuits. Additionally, he holds the prestigious position of an Editor at PLOS ONE, a renowned journal. In this capacity, he engages in rigorous review activities for esteemed publications like The Journal of Environmental Management, Climate Dynamics, and The Egyptian Journal of Remote Sensing and Space Sciences. Simultaneously, he is involved in various research initiatives with CAS (Center for Archaeological Studies), furthering his scholarly engagement.
Additionally, he shares his knowledge by instructing ULAB students on history, natural disasters, and disaster management. He aims to motivate and empower students by drawing on his in-depth knowledge of the disciplines, encouraging a thorough understanding of the material. He continually pursues academic excellence while making a significant contribution to the scholarly community through his multiple tasks that include research, editing duties, and teaching.
stated_interests: Landuse Dynamics, Geospatial Techniques, Climate Change, Environmental Pollution, Urban Planning and Environmental Management.

B. Sc in Geography and Environmental Science
